case_title: MILDRED M HENRY VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF HENRY, MILDRED M

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HENRY, MILDRED M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $95,999.23 PRINCIPAL, $499.72 INTEREST, $335.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $96,833.95, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
